sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_transform AS (SELECT DISTINCT GRP_ID, GRP_MVP_OPT_OUT_EFF_DT_SK, GRP_MVP_OPT_OUT_TERM_DT_SK, USER_ID, LAST_UPDT_DTM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_UWSOwner}.GRP_MVP_OPT_OUT) SELECT cte_transform.GRP_ID, cte_transform.GRP_MVP_OPT_OUT_EFF_DT_SK, cte_transform.GRP_MVP_OPT_OUT_TERM_DT_SK, cte_transform.USER_ID, cte_transform.LAST_UPDT_DTM FROM cte_transform
